hero.art_prompt: Neha, an 18 year old Indian girl fresh out of class 12, confidently starting an online college application on a laptop, relieved and hopeful, bright tidy home.

panels.narration: Fresh out of 12th, Neha wanted to apply for a BBA.
panels.img_prompt: Neha, 18, sitting with a laptop looking unsure at a confusing admissions page, question marks in her mind, modest home, hopeful but puzzled.

panels.narration: The forms and steps felt scattered and confusing.
panels.img_prompt: Neha surrounded by scattered documents and notes, trying to make sense of admission requirements, slightly stressed but determined.

panels.narration: Then she found one simple online admission process.
panels.img_prompt: Neha smiling with relief at a laptop showing a clean, simple step-by-step admission process, warm bright home.

panels.narration: She applied in minutes, guided at every step.
panels.img_prompt: Neha happily submitting her application on a laptop, giving a small confident thumbs up, proud and relieved, warm hopeful light.

turn.title: How BBA Admission Works
points: Eligibility is simple: pass class 12 in any stream.
The whole application is online, so you can apply from home in minutes.
No entrance exam, admission is merit based on your 12th marks.
Upload your documents, pay the registration fee, and a counsellor guides you through.

testimonials.name: Neha Joshi
testimonials.quote: I thought admission would be stressful. The online steps were clear and a counsellor guided me throughout.

testimonials.name: Rohan Gupta
testimonials.quote: I came from a science background and still joined BBA easily. No entrance exam, just my 12th marks.

testimonials.name: Aisha Khan
testimonials.quote: I applied from my phone at home. Uploading documents and paying the fee took only a few minutes.

testimonials.name: Karan Mehta
testimonials.quote: Every time I had a doubt, my counsellor answered. Admission felt easy and well supported.

facts.v: Merit based on 12th marks, no entrance exam
